_comment: Golden regression baselines: real per-portal settlement of a fully-settled month (SCED final, prices final), locking penny-exact engine output — the numbers that reach customers. Each entry is computed by tests/_settle_worker.py in its own process. If a LEGITIMATE data backfill (e.g. a DST fall-back re-pull) intentionally changes a settled month, rebaseline with:  python tests/regenerate_golden.py  — never edit a number to hide an engine regression.
